{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative (CSR)",
  "description": "Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small shops or pizza. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative (CSR)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

CJob Summary


	The ideal candidate will serve as the first point of contact for customers, ensuring they receive friendly, efficient, and accurate service at all times.
	You will interact with customers across various touchpoints, assist with orders, resolve concerns, and contribute to creating a seamless QSR experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to customers promptly and professionally
	Take and process customer orders accurately (in-person or via phone)
	Provide product information and assist customers in making selections
	Resolve customer inquiries or escalate when necessary
	Maintain a clean, organized, and customer-friendly service area
	Ensure adherence to QSR service standards and company policies
	Support daily operations as required by the supervisor/manager


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND is an added advantage
	Previous customer service experience, preferably in a QSR or hospitality environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
	Must be polite, patient, and service-oriented
	Must reside in or easily commute to Osapa, Orchid, Admiralty, Surulere, Ikoyi, or Ikota due to the nature of the business.


Salary
N130,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Customer Service Representative&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Uncle Stan's Food"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197006"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Customer Service Representative (CSR) Job at Uncle Stan's Food




        
    

        
        Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small shops or pizza. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative (CSR)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



CJob Summary


	The ideal candidate will serve as the first point of contact for customers, ensuring they receive friendly, efficient, and accurate service at all times.
	You will interact with customers across various touchpoints, assist with orders, resolve concerns, and contribute to creating a seamless QSR experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to customers promptly and professionally
	Take and process customer orders accurately (in-person or via phone)
	Provide product information and assist customers in making selections
	Resolve customer inquiries or escalate when necessary
	Maintain a clean, organized, and customer-friendly service area
	Ensure adherence to QSR service standards and company policies
	Support daily operations as required by the supervisor/manager


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND is an added advantage
	Previous customer service experience, preferably in a QSR or hospitality environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
	Must be polite, patient, and service-oriented
	Must reside in or easily commute to Osapa, Orchid, Admiralty, Surulere, Ikoyi, or Ikota due to the nature of the business.


Salary
N130,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Customer Service Representative” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Data Analyst",
  "description": "Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Extract, clean, transform, and analyze large datasets from relational (e.g., SQL) and non-relational databases (e.g., NoSQL, MongoDB).
	Create comprehensive reports, dashboards, and visualizations using tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or similar platforms.
	Present data-driven insights to senior management and other stakeholders in an understandable and actionable format.
	Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in data to solve business problems and improve operational efficiency.
	Recommend improvements to data collection, storage, and analysis methods to enhance accuracy and reliability.
	Stay updated with industry best practices and emerging technologies in data analytics.


Requirements


	Proven experience working with both relational (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL) and non-relational databases (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra).
	Strong knowledge of data visualization tools such as Metabase, Tableau, Power BI, or Apache Superset.
	Understanding of ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes and data warehousing concepts.
	Excellent communication skills to convey complex data insights to non-technical audiences.
	Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Source Microfinance Bank"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197005"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Data Analyst Job at Source Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Extract, clean, transform, and analyze large datasets from relational (e.g., SQL) and non-relational databases (e.g., NoSQL, MongoDB).
	Create comprehensive reports, dashboards, and visualizations using tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or similar platforms.
	Present data-driven insights to senior management and other stakeholders in an understandable and actionable format.
	Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in data to solve business problems and improve operational efficiency.
	Recommend improvements to data collection, storage, and analysis methods to enhance accuracy and reliability.
	Stay updated with industry best practices and emerging technologies in data analytics.


Requirements


	Proven experience working with both relational (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL) and non-relational databases (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra).
	Strong knowledge of data visualization tools such as Metabase, Tableau, Power BI, or Apache Superset.
	Understanding of ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes and data warehousing concepts.
	Excellent communication skills to convey complex data insights to non-technical audiences.
	Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Euracare is a leading healthcare provider in Nigeria, committed to delivering world-class medical services with a patient-first approach.o provide world-class medical services to patients without the stress and expense of international travel. To offer corporate companies and insurers efficient healthcare solutions for their employees and customers. To make available to physicians a technologically advanced and optimized work platform.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a dedicated and compassionate&nbsp;Medical Officer&nbsp;to join our healthcare team.
	The ideal candidate will provide high-quality clinical care, support patient management, and ensure compliance with medical best practices and organizational standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide comprehensive medical care to patients, including assessment, diagnosis, and treatment.
	Conduct routine patient consultations and follow-ups.
	Maintain accurate and detailed patient medical records.
	Participate in medical rounds, case discussions, and clinical audits.
	Ensure adherence to professional standards and regulatory requirements.
	Assist in emergency care and respond promptly to critical medical situations.
	Collaborate with nurses, specialists, and other healthcare professionals to deliver holistic care.
	Educate patients on health promotion and disease prevention.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS/MBChB) from a recognized institution.
	2&ndash;5 years of clinical experience (post-NYSC experience).
	Valid license to practice from the Medical and Dental Council of Nigeria (MDCN).
	Strong clinical reasoning, diagnostic, and problem?solving skills.
	Excellent communication, empathy, and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work in a fast?paced environment and manage medical emergencies.
	Proficiency in electronic medical record systems is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@euracare.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

To offer corporate companies and insurers efficient healthcare solutions for their employees and customers. To make available to physicians a technologically advanced and optimized work platform.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated and compassionate Medical Officer to join our healthcare team.
	The ideal candidate will provide high-quality clinical care, support patient management, and ensure compliance with medical best practices and organizational standards.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Healthcare Assistant",
  "description": "Caring Habitat is a 40-room purpose-built inpatient skilled nursing and rehabilitation hospital designed to complement the health outcomes of patients through the delivery robust rehabilitation program.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Healthcare Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Abraham Adesanya, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are an In-patient Nursing and Rehabilitation facility committed to supporting individuals on their journey to wellness and recovery. We require dynamic, self motivated and driven care givers in addition to our team to help render specialized care tailored to the health needs of our esteemed patients.


Responsibilities


	Rendering personal care; bed bathing and or assisted bathroom.
	Eating (support the patient during feed-time).
	Change patients&rsquo; soiled diapers, Incopad, slide sheet, and bed linen.
	Assist the patient in using the convenience.
	Transferring the patient using the Glide/Slide sheet and hoist to facilitate ambulation.
	Communication: Identify the patient&rsquo;s hobbies and often engage them in activities that are of interest to him/her, for example, play games, watch television programs, play music that the patient loves listening to, miming, storytelling, etc.
	Create a positive home-like environment by responding to patients&rsquo; needs promptly, respecting his/her privacy.
	Help the patient develop trust.
	Patient&rsquo;s confidentiality is vital.
	Offer emotional support and work with the family: show empathy and use appropriate words peculiar to the patient&rsquo;s condition.
	Maintain a clean, safe environment and report safety problems immediately.
	Communicate effectively and actively listen.
	Follow Infection Prevention /Control practices: using personal protective equipment such as face mask, hand glove, when hands are visibly soiled with patient body fluid, wash hands with soap under running water before and after attending to patients, and or use hand sanitizer, proper waste segregation, putting soiled and dirty clothes in separate laundry bags.
	Perform procedures correctly, following, &ldquo;Standard of Practice&rdquo; example, bed or assisted, bathroom, oral care, patient feeding, 2-hourly changing of the patient&rsquo;s position, and preparing wound dressing gauze.


Requirements


	A caregiver&#39;s certificate.
	1-3 Years of working experience as a caregiver.


Salary and Benefits


	N75,000 / Month (Net)
	Leave Allowance
	Pension and
	HMO.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Applications to:&nbsp;caringhabitatgl@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot; Healthcare Assistant&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Healthcare Assistant Job at Caring Habitat




        
    

        
        Caring Habitat is a 40-room purpose-built inpatient skilled nursing and rehabilitation hospital designed to complement the health outcomes of patients through the delivery robust rehabilitation program.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Healthcare Assistant

Job Location: Abraham Adesanya, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are an In-patient Nursing and Rehabilitation facility committed to supporting individuals on their journey to wellness and recovery. We require dynamic, self motivated and driven care givers in addition to our team to help render specialized care tailored to the health needs of our esteemed patients.


Responsibilities


	Rendering personal care; bed bathing and or assisted bathroom.
	Eating (support the patient during feed-time).
	Change patients’ soiled diapers, Incopad, slide sheet, and bed linen.
	Assist the patient in using the convenience.
	Transferring the patient using the Glide/Slide sheet and hoist to facilitate ambulation.
	Communication: Identify the patient’s hobbies and often engage them in activities that are of interest to him/her, for example, play games, watch television programs, play music that the patient loves listening to, miming, storytelling, etc.
	Create a positive home-like environment by responding to patients’ needs promptly, respecting his/her privacy.
	Help the patient develop trust.
	Patient’s confidentiality is vital.
	Offer emotional support and work with the family: show empathy and use appropriate words peculiar to the patient’s condition.
	Maintain a clean, safe environment and report safety problems immediately.
	Communicate effectively and actively listen.
	Follow Infection Prevention /Control practices: using personal protective equipment such as face mask, hand glove, when hands are visibly soiled with patient body fluid, wash hands with soap under running water before and after attending to patients, and or use hand sanitizer, proper waste segregation, putting soiled and dirty clothes in separate laundry bags.
	Perform procedures correctly, following, “Standard of Practice” example, bed or assisted, bathroom, oral care, patient feeding, 2-hourly changing of the patient’s position, and preparing wound dressing gauze.


Requirements


	A caregiver's certificate.
	1-3 Years of working experience as a caregiver.


Salary and Benefits


	N75,000 / Month (Net)
	Leave Allowance
	Pension and
	HMO.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Applications to: [email protected] using " Healthcare Assistant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Agent",
  "description": "Lamlan Digital Solutions is a global digital marketing agency that positions itself as a results-driven partner for businesses looking to scale their online presence. They have offices across several international hubs, including Kenya, Nigeria, Qatar, Canada &amp; Ghana.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Summary


	At Lamlan Digital Solutions, we help businesses navigate the complex digital landscape and turn their online presence into a revenue-generating machine. We are looking for a sharp, tech-savvy Sales Agent who understands the power of SEO, PPC, and Social Media, and knows how to communicate that value to business owners.
	In this role, you will be the bridge between a client&#39;s business goals and our agency&#39;s digital expertise.


Key Responsibilities


	Strategic Prospecting: Identify and reach out to B2B prospects who are underperforming online and could benefit from Lamlan&rsquo;s service suite.
	Consultative Selling: Conduct initial discovery calls to understand client pain points and business objectives.
	Present Digital Solutions: Pitch customized marketing strategies (SEO, Content, Paid Ads, Web Design) that align with the client&rsquo;s budget and goals.
	Value Articulation: Explain complex marketing KPIs&mdash;such as ROAS, CPC, and organic rankings&mdash;in a way that is easy for business owners to understand.
	Pipeline Management: Use CRM tools to manage the full sales cycle from &quot;cold lead&quot; to &quot;signed contract.&quot;
	Collaboration: Work closely with our creative and technical teams to ensure that the promises made during the sales process are achievable and impactful.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2-7 years experience.
	Digital Literacy: A strong understanding of the digital marketing ecosystem (SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Email Marketing).
	B2B Sales Experience: Proven track record of selling services to small-to-medium-sized businesses (SMBs) or corporate clients.
	The &quot;Closer&quot; Mindset: Comfortable asking for the sale and handling common objections regarding budget or &quot;doing it in-house.&quot;

Sales Agent Job at Lamlan Digital Limited




        
    

        
        Lamlan Digital Solutions is a global digital marketing agency that positions itself as a results-driven partner for businesses looking to scale their online presence. They have offices across several international hubs, including Kenya, Nigeria, Qatar, Canada & Ghana.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Agent

Job Location: Lekki Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	At Lamlan Digital Solutions, we help businesses navigate the complex digital landscape and turn their online presence into a revenue-generating machine. We are looking for a sharp, tech-savvy Sales Agent who understands the power of SEO, PPC, and Social Media, and knows how to communicate that value to business owners.
	In this role, you will be the bridge between a client's business goals and our agency's digital expertise.


Key Responsibilities


	Strategic Prospecting: Identify and reach out to B2B prospects who are underperforming online and could benefit from Lamlan’s service suite.
	Consultative Selling: Conduct initial discovery calls to understand client pain points and business objectives.
	Present Digital Solutions: Pitch customized marketing strategies (SEO, Content, Paid Ads, Web Design) that align with the client’s budget and goals.
	Value Articulation: Explain complex marketing KPIs—such as ROAS, CPC, and organic rankings—in a way that is easy for business owners to understand.
	Pipeline Management: Use CRM tools to manage the full sales cycle from "cold lead" to "signed contract."
	Collaboration: Work closely with our creative and technical teams to ensure that the promises made during the sales process are achievable and impactful.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2-7 years experience.
	Digital Literacy: A strong understanding of the digital marketing ecosystem (SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Email Marketing).
	B2B Sales Experience: Proven track record of selling services to small-to-medium-sized businesses (SMBs) or corporate clients.
	The "Closer" Mindset: Comfortable asking for the sale and handling common objections regarding budget or "doing it in-house."
	Communication Mastery: Excellent verbal and written skills; you must be able to write persuasive proposals and lead high-stakes presentations.
	Analytical Ability: Ability to look at a prospect's current website or social media and identify immediate "low-hanging fruit" opportunities for improvement.
	Tools: Experience with CRM platforms (HubSpot/Salesforce) and Google Workspace.
	Target: NB: The performance of this role is measured by the reasonable result obtained.
